title: Hakone trip planning
body:
## Getting there
Take the Romancecar from Shinjuku; it is a reserved-seat limited express and well worth the small surcharge for the comfort and the view.

## Ryokan
We booked two nights near Gora with a private onsen. Check-in is from 3pm and dinner is kaiseki at 6.

## Logistics
The ryokan does not accept credit cards, so payment is cash on arrival — bring enough yen for the full stay plus incidentals.

## Onsen etiquette
Rinse fully before entering, no swimsuits, tie long hair up, and keep the small towel out of the water.

title: Espresso troubleshooting
body:
Pulling good shots is about controlling extraction.

The key symptom to learn first is taste. If the shot tastes sour and thin and runs fast, the grind is too coarse and the water rushes through without extracting; the fix is to grind finer.

Conversely a harsh bitter shot that drips slowly is over-extracted, so coarsen the grind. Always change one variable at a time and re-taste.

title: Launch retrospective
body:
## Context
The payments revamp shipped in May after a tight quarter.

## What happened
Sarah owned the rollout. She decided to postpone it by a week when the load test surfaced a connection-pool limit. That call avoided an outage during the marketing push.

## Follow-ups
Add a pool-size alarm and document the rollback runbook.

title: Docker compose for local dev
body:
## Why
A reproducible local stack without polluting the host.

## Compose file
```yaml
services:
  db:
    image: postgres:16
    volumes:
      - pgdata:/var/lib/postgresql/data
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD", "pg_isready"]
  app:
    build: .
    depends_on:
      db:
        condition: service_healthy
volumes:
  pgdata:
```

## Run
Bring it up detached with docker compose up -d; the named volume survives a down.

title: Marathon training block
body:
## Structure
Sixteen weeks, one long run a week building about 1.5km each time.

## Recovery
Every fourth week is a cutback week to absorb the load and avoid injury.

## Intensity
Keep roughly 80 percent of mileage easy and conversational; only 20 percent is hard intervals and tempo.

title: Notes from the accountant meeting
body:
## Estimated payments
Quarterly estimated taxes are due April 15, June 15, September 15, and January 15.

## Safe harbor
Paying 110 percent of last year's tax avoids the underpayment penalty even if this year is higher.

## Depreciation
The new laptop is a section 179 expense this year rather than depreciated.

title: Sleeping better experiments
body:
## Light
No screens an hour before bed; the room cool and dark.

## Timing
A consistent wake time matters more than bedtime, and caffeine has a six-hour half-life so nothing past early afternoon.

## When it fails
If I wake at 3am and can't settle, get up and read something dull in dim light rather than lying there.
